tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 1
set action deny
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
set status enable
next
end

show firewall policy
show firewall address"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 1

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set service "PING"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set status enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "block-icmp-from-ubuntu"
        set uuid 0497ccf6-1d4f-51f1-1fe2-7dad8173e159
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-host"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 2
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 04f234ca-1d4f-51f1-9e35-431c07bb68e6
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall address
config firewall address
    edit "none"
        set uuid 857d5092-1611-51f1-625c-535de8633053
        set subnet 0.0.0.0 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "login.microsoftonline.com"
        set uuid 857d5ab0-1611-51f1-54ea-02a3a5cdc45a
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoftonline.com"
    next
    edit "login.microsoft.com"
        set uuid 857d5fe2-1611-51f1-62e9-bfc240da7b7b
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoft.com"
    next
    edit "login.windows.net"
        set uuid 857d64b0-1611-51f1-65d8-26728a9f8a30
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.windows.net"
    next
    edit "gmail.com"
        set uuid 857d6974-1611-51f1-b184-634e68fd8aac
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "gmail.com"
next
    edit "wildcard.google.com"
        set uuid 857d6dc0-1611-51f1-6ca8-7cea31e68025
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.google.com"
    next
    edit "wildcard.dropbox.com"
        set uuid 857d71ee-1611-51f1-71f7-4ba3d62d81e6
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.dropbox.com"
    next
    edit "all"
        set uuid 86593d96-1611-51f1-a70f-fb315689d0b4
    next
    edit "FIREWALL_AUTH_PORTAL_ADDRESS"
        set uuid 86593fb2-1611-51f1-9073-27812930fbd3
    next
    edit "FABRIC_DEVICE"
        set uuid 8659416a-1611-51f1-f065-70a3bb42c734
        set comment "IPv4 addresses of Fabric Devices."
    next
    edit "SSLVPN_TUNNEL_ADDR1"
        set uuid 865a078a-1611-51f1-8f5a-9a9144ce99b2
        set type iprange
set start-ip 10.212.134.200
        set end-ip 10.212.134.210
    next
    edit "LAN_subnet"
        set uuid a538b89e-1612-51f1-8a26-324c6b0b2242
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
    edit "Caldera_Server"
        set uuid a53e5c36-1612-51f1-c16b-d575bf4264eb
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "FCTEMS_ALL_FORTICLOUD_SERVERS"
        set uuid c70b3eae-1943-51f1-7596-16bbffbf623e
        set type dynamic
        set sub-type ems-tag
    next
    edit "UbuntuComputer-host"
        set uuid 9f24dfbc-1d4e-51f1-f8fb-179ed2b027e2
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
